headline: Agent tooling and inference throughput break out as Apple anchors its new AI architecture on Google Gemini models.
body: Apple revealed a new AI architecture built around Google Gemini models alongside its Core AI Framework, signaling a strategic decision to build on external foundation models rather than proprietary alternatives [0][1][5]. Agent-centric techniques are the dominant breakout cluster, with agent, AI engineering, and token pricing entering as new entrants, exemplified by the Nex N2 Pro 400B model aimed at frontier agentic performance [6]. Throughput scaling is also breaking out, driven by NVIDIA's NVFP4 training guidance on Blackwell and discussion of reaching 1000 tokens per second on a trillion-parameter model [4][11]. A purported supply-chain incident targeting Claude and Gemini users via a compromised Microsoft channel adds a security note to the window [2].

cited_items.title: Apple reveals new AI architecture built around Google Gemini models
Microsoft Hacked to Deliver Malware to Claude and Gemini Users
Train Models Faster with JAX and MaxText Using NVFP4 on NVIDIA Blackwell
Nex N2 Pro: Frontier agentic performance at 400B
